mapper.select: SELECT * FROM honor_types WHERE status = 1 AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY sort_order, id
SELECT * FROM honor_types WHERE category = #{category} AND status = 1 AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY sort_order, id
SELECT * FROM honor_types WHERE type_code = #{code} AND deleted = 0 LIMIT 1

SELECT ht.id, ht.type_code AS typeCode, ht.type_name AS typeName, ht.category, ht.evaluation_dimension AS evaluationDimension, ht.description, ht.required_attachments AS requiredAttachments, ht.sort_order AS sortOrder, ht.status, ht.created_at AS createdAt, ht.updated_at AS updatedAt, ( SELECT JSON_ARRAYAGG( JSON_OBJECT( 'id', hlc.id, 'levelCode', hlc.level_code, 'levelName', hlc.level_name, 'rankCode', hlc.rank_code, 'rankName', hlc.rank_name, 'score', hlc.score, 'maxCount', hlc.max_count, 'priority', hlc.priority, 'sortOrder', hlc.sort_order, 'status', hlc.status ) ) FROM honor_level_configs hlc WHERE hlc.honor_type_id = ht.id AND hlc.deleted = 0 ORDER BY hlc.priority DESC, hlc.sort_order ) AS levelConfigs FROM honor_types ht WHERE ht.id = #{id} AND ht.deleted = 0

SELECT ht.id, ht.type_code AS typeCode, ht.type_name AS typeName, ht.category, ht.evaluation_dimension AS evaluationDimension, ht.description, ht.required_attachments AS requiredAttachments, ( SELECT JSON_ARRAYAGG( JSON_OBJECT( 'id', hlc.id, 'levelCode', hlc.level_code, 'levelName', hlc.level_name, 'rankCode', hlc.rank_code, 'rankName', hlc.rank_name, 'score', hlc.score ) ) FROM honor_level_configs hlc WHERE hlc.honor_type_id = ht.id AND hlc.status = 1 AND hlc.deleted = 0 ORDER BY hlc.priority DESC ) AS levelConfigs FROM honor_types ht WHERE ht.status = 1 AND ht.deleted = 0 ORDER BY ht.category, ht.sort_order, ht.id
